intro: A magical take on classic Solitaire where every card tells a story. Play, level up, and customize every card.
description:
Solitaire Legends – Fables and Fairytales blends timeless Klondike Solitaire with a rich world inspired by classic fairytales and folklore.
Play traditional Solitaire in 1-card or 3-card draw mode, earning score and experience with every completed game. As you progress, you unlock beautifully illustrated cosmetic rewards inspired by legendary stories such as Little Red Riding Hood, Cinderella, Hansel and Gretel, Puss in Boots, Snow White, Maleficent, and many more.
Each playing card features unique fairytale artwork — heroes, villains, magical creatures, and iconic scenes brought to life in a storybook style. Every single card can be customized individually, allowing you to mix characters and tales across your deck.
Before each game, you can choose your preferred visuals: enchanted forests, castle halls, moonlit villages, or dark fairytale realms as backgrounds, along with themed card backs that match your favorite stories.
With relaxing gameplay, no time pressure, and a constantly expanding collection, Fables and Fairytales offers hours of magical Solitaire for players who love classic cards and timeless stories alike.
